text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is registered for the Takarazuka
Kinen, where her sister, Biwa Hayahide, will also
be racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, the two of them have a once-in-a-lifetime
chance to face each other at their very best. The
curtains rise on their sisterly showdown!
